en.extract:
The chattering cisticola (Cisticola anonymus) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae.
It is native to the African tropical rainforest.
Its natural habitats are dry savanna and swamps.

[[File:Cisticola anonymus MHNT.jpg|thumb|'' Cisticola anonymus'' - [[MHNT]]]]

The '''chattering cisticola''' ('''''Cisticola anonymus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cisticolidae]].
It is native to the [[Guineo-Congolian region|African tropical rainforest]].
Its natural [[habitat]]s are dry [[savanna]] and [[swamp]]s.
